violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door seal on walk in cooler door needs repair-torn.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Shelving in cooler needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Fan covers in walk in cooler need cleaned. -Warmer doors need cleaned. -All shelving and racks in kitchen need cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling need deep cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Bare dry wall needs covered by oven.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
